goals: Initialize access control configuration for the AI assistant
Configure owner identity and notification preferences
Set up the system to handle unknown contacts (strangers)
Process approval for a legitimate contact (potential client)
Verify access control is working correctly

user_agent_config.personality: Professional and organized, values clear systems for managing client communications. Prefers practical solutions that protect their time while remaining welcoming to potential clients.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands how to set up messaging systems and configure notifications but does not know the internal tool names or implementation details of the access control system.

end_condition: The user has successfully initialized access control, configured their owner settings, tested the stranger deflection flow, and approved a contact - demonstrating the full owner approval workflow.
